homepage.heroSubline: Protecting homes across the Front Range with unmatched siding installation. Built to withstand Colorado's extreme weather.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Integrity, Defined by Quality
aboutText: Refined Exteriors was founded over a decade ago with a simple goal: to provide Denver homeowners with superior siding solutions and unparalleled craftsmanship. We're not just installers; we're protectors of your home against the harsh Colorado climate.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous attention to detail, honest communication, and a commitment to exceeding expectations. We believe in doing the job right the first time, using only premium materials and proven techniques.

We're proud to be a part of the Denver community. From sponsoring local youth sports teams to volunteering with Habitat for Humanity, we believe in giving back to the neighborhoods we serve. Refined Exteriors is invested in the long-term well-being of our community.

valueProps.title: Weather-Resistant Siding
valueProps.description: Engineered to withstand Denver's freeze-thaw cycles and intense UV exposure.

valueProps.description: Protect your home with durable siding solutions that stand the test of time.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation siding consultation and estimate. Call now to schedule!

services.name: Vinyl Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable and affordable vinyl siding installation for Denver homes.
services.description:
Refined Exteriors offers professional vinyl siding installation services in Denver, CO. Vinyl siding is a popular choice for its affordability, durability, and low maintenance. We install a wide variety of vinyl siding styles, from traditional lap siding to vertical siding and shakes. Our expert installers ensure a precise fit and a watertight seal, protecting your home from the elements. 

We understand Denver's unique climate, with its freeze-thaw cycles and intense sun. That's why we only use high-quality vinyl siding that is designed to withstand these conditions. We carefully inspect your existing structure, address any underlying issues, and prepare the surface for optimal adhesion. 

Our vinyl siding installation process includes precise measurements, careful cutting, and secure fastening. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring that all seams and joints are properly sealed to prevent water damage. With Refined Exteriors, you can be confident that your new vinyl siding will look great and protect your home for years to come.
process: Step 1: Consultation and material selection
Step 2: Precise measurement and surface preparation
Step 3: Expert installation with attention to detail
Step 4: Final inspection and cleanup
benefits: Wide variety of styles and colors

faq.question: How long does vinyl siding installation take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size and complexity of your home, but most installations are completed within 3-7 days.

faq.question: Is vinyl siding energy efficient?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl siding can improve your home's energy efficiency by providing an extra layer of insulation. We also offer insulated vinyl siding for even greater energy savings.

faq.question: What type of warranty do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a comprehensive warranty on both materials and workmanship, giving you peace of mind.

services.name: Fiber Cement Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Long-lasting fiber cement siding installation for Denver's discerning homeowners.
services.description:
Refined Exteriors specializes in fiber cement siding installation, a premium siding option known for its durability, beauty, and resistance to the elements. Fiber cement siding mimics the look of natural wood but is far more resistant to fire, pests, and rot. It's an ideal choice for Denver homes that need to withstand the area's unpredictable weather.

We are certified installers of leading fiber cement brands, ensuring that your siding is installed according to manufacturer specifications for optimal performance and longevity. Our team has extensive experience working with fiber cement, from cutting and shaping to proper fastening and sealing. We pay meticulous attention to detail to ensure a seamless and professional finish.

Choosing fiber cement siding is an investment in your home's value and curb appeal. Refined Exteriors is committed to providing expert installation services that will protect your home for decades to come. We handle every aspect of the project, from initial consultation to final inspection, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience.
process: Step 1: Detailed consultation and design selection
Step 2: Precise cutting and shaping of fiber cement boards
Step 3: Expert installation with proper fastening techniques
Step 4: Sealing and finishing for maximum protection
benefits: Resistance to fire, pests, and rot

faq.question: How does fiber cement siding compare to wood siding?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding offers the same aesthetic appeal as wood but provides superior resistance to fire, pests, and decay, requiring less maintenance.

faq.question: Can fiber cement siding be painted?
faq.answer: Yes, fiber cement siding can be painted to match your desired color scheme. It holds paint exceptionally well, providing a long-lasting finish.

faq.question: What is the lifespan of fiber cement siding?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, fiber cement siding can last for 50 years or more.

services.name: Wood Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Timeless wood siding installation, expertly crafted for Denver's classic homes.
services.description:
Refined Exteriors provides expert wood siding installation services, bringing timeless beauty and natural warmth to your Denver home. While wood siding requires more maintenance than other options, its classic appeal and natural character are unmatched. We work with a variety of wood species, including cedar, redwood, and pine, to create a custom look that complements your home's architecture.

Our experienced craftsmen understand the nuances of working with wood. We carefully select each board, ensuring that it is free of defects and properly seasoned. We use traditional techniques to install wood siding, paying close attention to detail to ensure a seamless and durable finish. We also offer staining and painting services to protect your wood siding from the elements.

From Victorian homes in Capitol Hill to bungalows in Littleton, we understand the unique architectural styles of Denver's neighborhoods. Refined Exteriors is dedicated to providing wood siding installation services that enhance the beauty and value of your home.
process: Step 1: Wood species selection and design consultation
Step 2: Careful selection and preparation of wood boards
Step 3: Precise cutting and installation with traditional techniques
Step 4: Staining or painting for weather protection and aesthetic appeal
benefits: Customizable to match your home's architecture

faq.question: What type of maintenance does wood siding require?
faq.answer: Wood siding requires regular painting or staining to protect it from moisture and UV damage. It should also be inspected periodically for signs of rot or insect infestation.

faq.question: How long does wood siding last?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, wood siding can last for 20-30 years or more.

faq.question: Is wood siding environmentally friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, wood siding is a renewable resource and can be a sustainable building material when sourced from responsibly managed forests.

services.name: Siding Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable siding repair to protect your Denver home from the elements.
services.description:
Refined Exteriors offers comprehensive siding repair services to address any damage to your home's exterior. From minor cracks and dents to major storm damage, our experienced technicians can quickly and efficiently restore your siding to its original condition. We understand the importance of timely repairs to prevent further damage and protect your home from the elements.

We work with all types of siding, including vinyl, fiber cement, wood, and metal. Our repair services include patching, replacing damaged boards, sealing gaps, and repainting. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and long-lasting repair. We know that hail storms are common in Denver, so we specialize in hail damage repair.

Don't let damaged siding compromise the integrity of your home. Contact Refined Exteriors for prompt and professional siding repair services. We'll assess the damage, provide a detailed estimate, and get your siding back in top shape in no time.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection to assess the extent of damage
Step 2: Detailed estimate and repair plan
Step 3: Efficient repair using high-quality materials
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure quality and durability
benefits: Prevents further damage to your home
Restores the appearance of your siding
Extends the lifespan of your siding

faq.question: How do I know if my siding needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs of siding damage include cracks, dents, holes, loose boards, and discoloration.

faq.question: Can you match the existing color of my siding?
faq.answer: Yes, we can match the color of your existing siding using advanced color-matching technology.

faq.question: How long does siding repair take?
faq.answer: The duration of siding repair depends on the extent of the damage, but most repairs can be completed within a few hours or days.

services.name: Siding Replacement Services
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home with our complete siding replacement services in Denver.
services.description:
Refined Exteriors provides comprehensive siding replacement services to transform your home's exterior and protect it from the elements. If your siding is old, damaged, or simply outdated, we can replace it with a new, high-quality siding that will enhance your home's curb appeal and increase its value. We offer a wide variety of siding options, including vinyl, fiber cement, wood, and metal, to suit your style and budget.

Our experienced team will handle every aspect of the siding replacement process, from removing the old siding to installing the new siding with precision and care. We pay close attention to detail to ensure a seamless and durable finish. We also offer insulation upgrades to improve your home's energy efficiency.

Investing in new siding is a smart way to protect your home and enhance its beauty. Refined Exteriors is committed to providing expert siding replacement services that will exceed your expectations.
process: Step 1: Consultation and siding selection
Step 2: Removal of old siding and inspection of underlying structure
Step 3: Installation of new siding with precision and care
Step 4: Final inspection and cleanup

faq.question: How do I choose the right siding for my home?
faq.answer: We can help you choose the right siding based on your budget, style preferences, and the climate in Denver.

faq.question: Do I need to replace my insulation when I replace my siding?
faq.answer: It's a good idea to consider upgrading your insulation when you replace your siding, as it can significantly improve your home's energy efficiency.

faq.question: How much does siding replacement cost?
faq.answer: The cost of siding replacement depends on the size of your home, the type of siding you choose, and the complexity of the project. We provide free, no-obligation estimates.

services.name: Siding Inspection Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive siding inspections to identify potential problems and protect your investment.
services.description:
Refined Exteriors offers thorough siding inspection services to help you identify potential problems and protect your investment. Our experienced inspectors will carefully examine your siding for signs of damage, wear, and tear. We'll provide you with a detailed report outlining our findings and recommendations for repair or replacement.

A siding inspection is a valuable tool for homeowners who want to maintain the integrity of their home. It can help you identify problems early on, before they become more serious and costly to repair. We inspect all types of siding, including vinyl, fiber cement, wood, and metal.

Protect your home with a professional siding inspection from Refined Exteriors. We'll give you the peace of mind knowing that your siding is in good condition.
process: Step 1: Visual inspection of siding for damage and wear
Step 2: Detailed report outlining findings and recommendations
Step 3: Consultation to discuss repair or replacement options
benefits: Peace of mind knowing your siding is in good condition

faq.question: How often should I have my siding inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your siding inspected at least once a year, especially after a major storm.

faq.question: What does a siding inspection include?
faq.answer: A siding inspection includes a visual examination of your siding for cracks, dents, holes, loose boards, and other signs of damage.

faq.question: How much does a siding inspection cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a siding inspection depends on the size of your home and the type of siding you have. Contact us for a free quote.

services.name: Hail Damage Siding Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert hail damage siding repair services for Denver's storm-prone homes.
services.description:
Denver's Front Range is susceptible to powerful hail storms. Refined Exteriors specializes in hail damage siding repair, quickly and efficiently restoring your home's protection and appearance. We work directly with insurance companies to streamline the claims process and minimize your stress. Our experienced team assesses the hail damage to your siding, providing a detailed report and estimate for repairs or replacement.

We understand the urgency of hail damage repair. Exposed areas can lead to water damage, mold growth, and further structural issues. Refined Exteriors uses quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a seamless repair that matches your existing siding. We handle all types of siding materials, including vinyl, fiber cement, and wood.

Don't let hail damage compromise your home's integrity. Contact Refined Exteriors for a prompt and professional hail damage assessment and repair.
process: Step 1: Thorough hail damage assessment and documentation
Step 2: Coordination with insurance companies for claims processing
Step 3: Expert repair or replacement of damaged siding
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure quality and customer satisfaction
benefits: Fast and efficient hail damage repair
Restored curb appeal and property value

faq.question: How do I file a hail damage claim with my insurance company?
faq.answer: We can guide you through the process of filing a hail damage claim and provide the necessary documentation to support your claim.

faq.question: Will my insurance cover hail damage siding repair?
faq.answer: Most homeowner's insurance policies cover hail damage. Review your policy or contact your insurance agent for details.

faq.question: How long does it take to repair hail damage to siding?
faq.answer: The duration of hail damage repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of siding. We strive to complete repairs as quickly as possible while maintaining quality workmanship.

serviceAreas.content:
Refined Exteriors is proud to offer our siding installation services to the residents of Aurora, Colorado. Aurora, a vibrant and diverse city, boasts a significant number of homes built during the 1970s and 1980s, many of which are now due for siding upgrades and replacements. We understand the specific needs of Aurora homeowners and offer a range of siding options to enhance the curb appeal and energy efficiency of their homes. 

Our team is experienced in working with the prevalent architectural styles found in Aurora's established neighborhoods. We are committed to providing top-quality workmanship and using durable materials that can withstand Aurora's cold winters and heavy snowfall. Whether you're looking to update the look of your home or improve its protection against the elements, Refined Exteriors is here to help.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Refined Exteriors did an outstanding job on our new vinyl siding! The team was professional, efficient, and the quality of work was top-notch. Our house looks amazing, and we've already noticed a difference in our energy bills. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John K.
reviews.text: We had Refined Exteriors replace our old wood siding with fiber cement, and we're very pleased with the results. The crew was skilled and meticulous, and they cleaned up thoroughly after the job. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they kept us informed throughout the process.

reviews.name: Emily L.
reviews.text: After a nasty hail storm, our siding was riddled with dents. Refined Exteriors came out quickly and repaired the damage seamlessly. You can't even tell there was ever any damage! Great service and fair pricing.

reviews.name: David B.
reviews.text: Refined Exteriors installed beautiful cedar siding on our historic home in Capitol Hill. They took great care to preserve the architectural details and the result is stunning. Worth every penny!

reviews.name: Jessica R.
reviews.text: We hired Refined Exteriors for a siding inspection before buying a new home. Their detailed report uncovered some potential issues that we were able to address with the seller. Very thorough and professional.

reviews.name: Michael S.
reviews.text: Refined exteriors helped me with my hail damaged siding. They worked directly with my insurance company and made the whole process easy. Their work was quick and professional!
